nasb.text: Behold, I am against the prophets,” declares the Lord, “who use their tongues and declare, ‘The Lord declares.’

esv.text: Behold, I am against the prophets, declares the Lord, who use their tongues and declare, ‘declares the Lord.’

cnv.text: “看哪！那些先知用自己的舌頭說：‘這是耶和華的宣告’，我要對付他們。”這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“看啊，我要对付那些假先知，他们妄自说预言，却谎称是耶和华的话。”
